step1.title: Selection of Size and Water Protection Level
step1.description: The AquaLOCK® gate offers reliable protection with a maximum width of 5,000 mm and a water protection height of up to 1,200 mm.

included.title: Included by default
included.description: The assembly kit with sealing is mandatory and is automatically added to the total price.
included.auto: Automatically included depending on gate width
included.breakdownTitle: Included by default depending on gate width:

upperDesign.title: Options for designing the upper area

size.title: Gate Size
size.totalHeight: Desired Total Gate Height (up to 2,000 mm)

step1.validation: Please enter a valid width (800–5000 mm), water protection height (500–1200 mm), and total gate height up to 2000 mm (must be greater than or equal to protection height).

images.wood: Gate with wood paneling (price on request)

opening.title: Opening Direction
opening.description: The AquaLOCK® gate can be opened inwards or outwards. With inward opening, the locks must withstand water pressure. With outward opening, they press the gate shut.
opening.subtitle: Opening direction and opening angle

installation.title: Installation Method
installation.description: Fitting methods: in front of, behind or between the reveal. If unsure, our technicians will clarify on site.

color.title: Choose Colour
color.description: To perfectly match your AquaLOCK® gate to your building, you can choose from 216 RAL colours. Seven standard colours (white and six shades of grey) are available at no extra charge.
color.note: Please note: Colours displayed may differ due to monitor settings. No guarantee for exact colour match.
color.standard: This is a standard colour and carries no extra charge.
color.custom: Selected colour is a non-standard RAL colour and incurs an extra charge of €{price}.

fittings.title: Gate Fittings
fittings.description: Would you like to operate the gate using a door handle? Choose from the options below. If no selection is made, the gate will be delivered without a lock and handle.
fittings.aluminum_both: Lever handle inside and outside – Aluminum F1
fittings.stainless_both: Lever handle inside and outside – Stainless steel
fittings.aluminum_inside: Lever handle inside only – Aluminum F1
fittings.stainless_inside: Lever handle inside only – Stainless steel
fittings.aluminum_knob: Lever handle inside, fixed knob outside – Aluminum F1
fittings.stainless_knob: Lever handle inside, fixed knob outside – Stainless steel

step4.title: Locking System & Accessories

centralLocking.title: Central Locking
centralLocking.note: (For inward-opening gates only, operated from the inside)
centralLocking.description: The central locking system allows all individual locking bolts to be operated via a central lever.

with.label: With central locking system
with.description: All locking bolts operated via a central lever

without.label: Without central locking system
without.description: All locking bolts must be operated individually

gateStop.label: Gate stop
gateStop.description: Secures the gate against a wall, preventing unwanted opening

padlockPreparation.label: Padlock preparation
padlockPreparation.description: Prepared for padlock use (padlock not included)

durchgriff.label: Through-access with central locking
durchgriff.description: Allows opening from outside (only for inward-opening gates with central locking)

step4.imageCaption: Gate with through-access and central locking, allowing opening from outside
